title: Jaiz Mobs
description:
Jaizmobs was a small project to get me familiar with modding, and from here will no longer be updated or bug fixed.

Jaiz Mobs adds 20+ new features (as of the full release - 0.11.1.20.4 and up)
body: Jaiz Mobs is a mod aimed at improving minecraft diversity in terms of entities. Monsters and creatures will now spawn all over the world. Things such as the seed dropping cultivator in the cherry blossom biome, to  the VoidBull, guarding the outer end islands, there is a wide range of new things to explore. As of 0.11-1.20.4, this mod will bring 20+ new mobs / features to the game!
